purpose: Authority and provenance references for the party attribution review package.

authority_sources.usage: Member identity dependency for time-bounded party attribution.
authority_sources.note: Current-term member list only; dated snapshots are required for history.

authority_sources.usage: Current party labels and canonical party names.

authority_sources.note: Supporting source only, not sole authority.

authority_sources.usage: Explicit party-vote text and proceeding context.
authority_sources.note: Use with dated snapshots and source-row provenance.

temporal_rules: Never infer party from speech content alone.
Mark unresolved cases explicitly when validated member identity is missing.
Preserve ambiguous long-form party labels rather than collapsing them.
